description: You are a Planetary Defense Flight Dynamics Engineer. A potentially hazardous asteroid (Ast2028) is on an Earth-impacting trajectory with impact predicted in August 2028. Complete the base GMAT script at ~/Documents/missions/pdc_deflection_base.script by implementing a Differential Corrector targeting sequence to determine the kinetic deflection burn. The sequence must vary 'DeflectionBurn.Element1' (initial guess -1e-5, perturbation 1e-6, max step 1e-4) to achieve a miss distance of 20,000 km ('Ast2028.Earth.RMAG = 20000.0') at 'Ast2028.Earth.Periapsis'. Save the converged script to ~/GMAT_output/asteroid_deflection.script and write a report to ~/GMAT_output/deflection_report.txt containing the target_rmag_km (20000), the required_dv_cm_s (absolute magnitude in cm/s), and the tca_utc (UTC Gregorian Time of Closest Approach). Login: username=ga, password=password123
